samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a module of carry-lookahead 32-bit adders.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <task>Design a 32-bit adder using the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture.</task>
    <implementation>
        <description>
            Create a 32-bit adder using the CLA architecture.
        </description>
        <for>
            <from>1</from>
            <to>32</to>
            <implementation>
                <description>
                    Add corresponding bits of A and B, storing the result in S.
                </description>
                <if>
                    <condition>carry == 0</condition>
                    <then>
                        Add A[i] and B[i]. Store the result in S[i].
                    </then>
                </if>
            </implementation>
        </for>
    </implementation>
</module>
